label: Job giver AI resurrect target
description: Finds a nearby corpse of the same faction and uses the configured ability to resurrect it.

abilityDef.label: Ability def
abilityDef.description: The resurrection ability to cast on the target corpse.

expiryInterval.label: Expiry interval
expiryInterval.description: Ticks before the issued resurrection job expires.

maxRegions.label: Max regions
maxRegions.description: Region search limit when trying to find a cast position for the resurrection.
